mapper.select: SELECT * FROM badges ORDER BY required_points ASC
SELECT b.* FROM user_badges ub JOIN badges b ON ub.badge_id = b.id WHERE ub.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT b.* FROM badges b WHERE b.id NOT IN ( SELECT ub.badge_id FROM user_badges ub WHERE ub.user_id = #{userId} )
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_badges(user_id, badge_id) VALUES(#{userId}, #{badgeId})
